description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 3 platform/commercial cluster. Pins platform structure apart from entitlement design and cost modeling.

cases.prompt: Structure this product as a multi-tenant SaaS — what's shared, what's isolated per tenant, and what belongs in the control plane?
cases.reason: Pooling decisions and the control-plane/data-plane split are platform structure, not plans or cost.

cases.prompt: Map our Free, Pro, and Enterprise tiers into concrete feature access and limits that get enforced the same way in the UI, API, and background jobs.
cases.reason: Plan-to-entitlement mapping and enforcement points are commercial gating, not platform shape.

cases.prompt: Work out what each tenant actually costs us to serve and whether the Enterprise price covers the big ones.
cases.reason: Cost attribution and unit economics per tenant/plan, not a structural design question.
